characters.name: Benny Weir
characters.description: Benny WeirInformationFull NameBenjamin WeirNicknamesBenny, BenDate of Birthc. 1996 (age 14-15 in movie and show)StatusUnknownResides in53 Orchard ParkWhitechapel, Ontario CanadaOccupationHigh School StudentSpellmasterSpeciesSpellmaster(originally/currently)Zombie(briefly/cursed)Family InformationRelativesUnnamed (father)Unnamed (mother)Evelyn Weir(paternal grandmother)Romance(s)Della(ex-crush/kissed)Erica Jones(crush)Friend(s)Ethan Morgan(best friend)Rory Keaner(best friend)Sarah Fox(best friend)Erica Jones(close friend)DellaDavid StachowskiBoltz(temporary)Lucia(while possessed)JesseEnemiesJesse(formerly)Gord†StephanieCoach EdVice Principal SternAffiliationWeir FamilyWhitechapel High SchoolPhysical DescriptionGenderMaleEye ColorGreenHair ColorBrownAppearancePortrayed byAtticus MitchellSeason1,2First AppearanceMy Babysitter's a Vampire (film)Last AppearanceThe Date to End All Dates(Part 2)Benny Weiris the loud and goofy best friend ofEthan Morgan, who is born as aSpellmaster, a person with the power to cast spells and use magic. He often gets into trouble with his antics. He is a student atWhitechapel High.  Benny has been Ethan's best friend since they were children. While he is just as brave and strategically clever as his pal, Benny admits that in his case it only applies to video games. Benny's dream is to one day make it big as a sorcerer or wizard, paranormal expert, and babe magnet. He discovers that he is aspellmasterright before theDusk III: Unbittenadvance screening when hisGrandma Weirgives him aspellbookand Ethan somedaggers. He is similar to Ethan, being geeky and book-smart. He and Ethan understand each other better than anyone else, although Benny is more funny and outspoken than Ethan while Ethan is the more serious and sarcastic one. Benny often tries to lighten the mood when things get too intense. He is girl-crazy and frequently drags Ethan into his schemes, getting them both in trouble. Despite that, Benny is a genuine friend to Ethan and is always ready to go on another adventure. He is similar to Ethan, book-smart with an encyclopedic knowledge of science fiction, comic books and video games. Benny often struggles with how to most effectively use magic but practices daily to improve. In season 2, it's his second year inWhitechapel Highand is still continuing his skills as a Spellmaster while surviving typical High School challenges.

characters.name: Boltz
characters.description: Boltz was a Frankenstein monster. He was built by the Whitechapel Hockey CoachMr. Steinerout of body parts from dead hockey players to guarantee success for the Whitechapel team. Mr. Steiner made Boltz using the best body parts from former great hockey players of Whitechapel. To bring Boltz to life, Mr. Steiner used the Eye of Zartak, a mystical Jewel that resurrected the dead. At hockey try outs, Boltz smashes the other students, yet he is not the perfect player. Although his incredible physical abilities makes him invincible, his lack of intelligence proves to be a fatal limitation; he starts shooting in his own team's goal. Mr. Steiner concludes Boltz needed the brain of an expert and targeted Ethan. After Getting Kidnapped And Getting Procedure On Surgery By Mr. Steiner, Boltz to his physical lack of a brain, Boltz acted as a mindless beast. He was nonverbal, communicating through grunts and growls. When frustrated with a task, usually incredibly simple, he resorted to violence, such as punching his locker door. Despite his animal personality, he caught the attention of Erica. Sarah often insulted Boltz for his "B.O" as a hockey player. Boltz was loyal and obedient to Mr. Steiner, following his orders both in games and out.

characters.name: Dazzle Dan
characters.description: Dazzle Danis a doll thatEthanpretended to be in the EpisodeGuys and Dolls. Dazzle Dan is the male counterpart ofDebbie Dazzle(similar to Barbie and Ken), who owns a hover-yacht. Ethan dressed up as and pretended to be Dan so that he could trick Debbie and convince her to go back to being a doll. SeeGuys and Dollsfor more info

characters.name: Debbie Dazzle
characters.description: Debbie DazzleisJane's magical doll who she brought to life when she overheardBennytalking about a spell that is told to fix anything. She is the main antagonist of the episodeGuys & Dolls She loves cupcakes, ice cream, disco dance parties and make overs. Debbie didn't like being a doll. She claimed it was boring and she wanted to have fun. After she was locked in a room byEthanshe metRoryand practically used him just to have fun. They broke up because she was tearing apart. In order to stay alive, she sucks energy out of humans, thus turning them into dolls. For the Debbie Dazzle gallery, gohere.

characters.name: Della
characters.description: DellaInformationFull NameDellaDate of Birth1997StatusAliveResides in53 Orchard Park (Possibly)Whitechapel, Ontario CanadaOccupationHigh School StudentMovie Theater Employee (formerly)Relationship StatusSingleSpeciesHumanFamily InformationRelativesHer dadHer momPuffles(pet dog) †Romance(s)Benny WeirFriend(s)Benny WeirEthan MorganRoss MorganSamantha MorganJane MorganSarah FoxRory KeanerEnemiesJesseGord; †AffiliationHer parentsWhitechapel High SchoolPhysical DescriptionGenderFemaleEye ColorHazelHair ColorBlondeAppearancePortrayed byRebecca DaltonSeason1First AppearanceMy Babysitter's a Vampire (film)Last AppearanceLawn of the DeadDellais a girl who goes toWhitechapel High School. She appeared in theMy Babysitter's a Vampire (film)as thePopcorn Ladyand. Reappeared asDellainLawn of the Deadepisode theRe-Vamped episode. Della is a girl heartbroken over the death of her dog,Puffles. In an attempt to win her heart,Bennyoffers her flowers, which makes her very emotional and brings her to say. she'd do anything to have him back. Benny uses arevival potionto bring Puffles back to life, but as his soul has moved on, Puffles does not recognize Della and attacks her and the rest of the school. Only the mention of Puffles causes Della to burst into tears. InReVampedshe spoke briefly toRoryand glanced at Benny, who planned on asking her to dance.

characters.name: Della's Dad
characters.description: Samantha Morgan Della's Dadappeared in the episodeLawn of the Dead. He came over to the Morgans' house to eat dinner with hiswife. Ever sincePufflesdied, he has been trying to getDellaover it and is shown to be rather fed up with her reaction to her dog's death. Ross is the client of Della's Dad.

characters.name: Della's Mom
characters.description: Ross Morgan Mrs. Pufflesappeared in the episodeLawn of the Dead. She came over to eat dinner at the Morgans' house one night. Ever since their dogPufflesdied, she has probably been trying to help her daughterDellaget over it with help fromher husband. she, like the rest of the family, suspects nothing going on while the kids fight zombie animals in the kitchen.

characters.name: El Merlo Loco
characters.description: El Merlo Loco is a combination of a Mexican wrestler and the wizard Merlin. He is whatBennydressed up as for Ethan's Halloween Party. Roryaccidently turns Benny into the real El Merlo Loco after Rory was possessed byTaquaks Mask. El Merlo Loco can only speak Spanish but seems to understand English. He breaks the curse inHalloweirdby blasting Tauquaks Mask off of Rory with lightning.

characters.name: Erica Jones
characters.description: Erica JonesInformationFull NameErica JonesDate of Birth1994 (age: 16-17)StatusUndeadTurnedByGordResides in17 Orchard ParkWhitechapel, Ontario CanadaOccupationHigh School StudentGangster (formerly)Cheerleader (briefly)WaitressRelationship StatusSingleSpeciesHuman(originally/formerly)Vampire(currently)Killed byGordCause of DeathNeck BiteFamily InformationRelativesUnnamed fatherUnnamed motherRomance(s)Gord;† (former love interest)Jesse(ex-boyfriend)Kurt Lockner(ex-boyfriend)David Stachowski(ex-crush)Rory Keaner(one-sided on Rory's side)Boltz(former crush)Dirk Baddison(ex-boyfriend)Benny Weir(kissed while under a spell/possible crush)Friend(s)Sarah Fox(best friend)Benny Weir(close friend)Ethan Morgan(close friend)Rory KeanerKurt LocknerDavid StachowskiGord;†Anastasia(sometimes)EnemiesStephanieJesse(currently/ex-friend)Annie VeeOlder NurseDebbie DazzleEvil HannahLuciaBoltzSerenaVice Principal SternAffiliationJones FamilyMember of Jesse's Gang (formerly)Whitechapel High SchoolThe Vampire CouncilPhysical DescriptionGenderFemaleEye ColorTurquoise (occasionally orange & yellow when fangs are flashed)Hair ColorBlondeAppearancePortrayed byKate ToddSeason1,2First AppearanceMy Babysitter's a Vampire (film)Last AppearanceThe Date to End All Dates(Part 2) Gangster (formerly)Cheerleader (briefly)Waitress Vampire(currently) Erica's personality in the film is first shown to be geeky, nerdy and kind-hearted. However, after or being bit, she goes through a huge personality change. She turns into the a popular mean girl and bullies others who were like her (before becoming a vampire). In the series, she became more confident and full of herself as well. She still behaves like a bully towards others, although she continues to have some compassion for her friends, even though she rarely admits it. She has also shown to be very deceitful, using her newly-acquired popularity and abilities at school in order to fool others. Particularly her friends and, more specifically, Rory and Sarah. Since she was bitten, Erica relished in being a vampire, having loved the once fictional species even before learning the truth, and continues to try and strengthen her status as a vampire by constantly feeding on students and practicing her other abilities, like glamour if, although she often fails to uphold the rules of traditional vampirism. She is also very rebellious and does not seem to care very much about the people she feeds on, even if they are hurt or turned in the process of this, and often disregards and scoffs at Sarah’s reluctance to become a vampire, ignoring the fact that Sarah never wanted to be one in the first place and her life was technically ruined because of this. Despite these negative traits, Erica still has a good heart deep down, considering that she shows some amount of kindness to her friends, and is more often than not loyal to Sarah, whom she cares about very much.

characters.name: Ethan Morgan
characters.description: Ethan MorganInformationFull NameEthan MorganDate of BirthJanuary 17, 1996 (age: 14 (season 1),15 (season 2))StatusAlive (possibly)Resides in17 Orchard ParkWhitechapel, Ontario CanadaOccupationHigh School StudentVampire HunterProtector of WhitechapelRelationship StatusDatingSarah FoxSpeciesHuman(Seer)Werewolf(formerly/cursed)Vampire(fictional/temporarily)Family InformationRelativesUnnamed(great-great-grandfather)Ross Morgan(father)Samantha Morgan(mother)Jane Morgan(younger sister)Romance(s)Sarah Fox(girlfriend)Hannah Price(Double Negative)Friend(s)Benny Weir(best friend)Rory Keaner(best friend)Sarah Fox(lover/best friend)Erica Jones(close friend)Evelyn WeirDellaDavid StachowskiCoach Ed(good friend)†Boltz(temporary)Hannah PriceJesseEnemiesJesse(formerly)Gord;† (victim)StephanieKurt LocknerLucia; †(victim)AffiliationMorgan FamilyWhitechapel High SchoolPhysical DescriptionGenderMaleEye ColorBrown (White When Having Visions)Hair ColorBrownAppearancePortrayed byMatthew KnightSeasonone,twoFirst AppearanceMy Babysitter's a Vampire (film)Last AppearanceThe Date to End All Dates(Part 2)Ethan Morganis the leading male of theMy Babysitter's a Vampireseries. He is a geeky, sci-fi loving young teenager who along with his best friendBenny,  discovered that hisbabysitterwas avampire, and discovers he is supernatural himself, as he is aSeer. 15 (season 2)) He later musters up the courage to ask his crush, best friend, supernatural fighting partnerSarahon a date. They indeed begin to develop a romantic relationship in the two-part season finale,The Date to End All Dates, however after the date it is still unknown if they are indeed dating. Aside from being part of two different worlds, Ethan accepts Sarah just the way she is, even if it means she is a vampire.

characters.name: Evelyn Weir
characters.description:
Evelyn"Grandma" Weir, is a powerfulEarth priestess(a witch-like magical practitioner on the side of good). She reveals her powers toSarah,Jane,EthanandBennyand tells them that Benny was aSpellmasterandEthanwas aSeer(a person with the ability to see the future). 
Evelyn has been there to give advice and aid them in the gang's adventures.
She drives a red-and-white 1956 Chevrolet in like-new condition. InIndependence Dazeher name is revealed to be Evelyn, however viewers may have noticed that inThree Cheers for Evilwhen Benny and Ethan come across a photograph of her with former cheerleaders in the old yearbook, a different name is printed under the photograph.

characters.name: Evelyn Weir
characters.description:
Evelyn"Grandma" Weir, is a powerfulEarth priestess(a witch-like magical practitioner on the side of good). She reveals her powers toSarah,Jane,EthanandBennyand tells them that Benny was aSpellmasterandEthanwas aSeer(a person with the ability to see the future). 
Evelyn has been there to give advice and aid them in the gang's adventures.
She drives a red-and-white 1956 Chevrolet in like-new condition. InIndependence Dazeher name is revealed to be Evelyn, however viewers may have noticed that inThree Cheers for Evilwhen Benny and Ethan come across a photograph of her with former cheerleaders in the old yearbook, a different name is printed under the photograph.

characters.name: Humans vs. Vampires
characters.description: Humans vs. Vampiresis an interactive game based onMy Babysitter's a Vampire. It can be played on the official website athttp://www.mybabysittersavampire.comIt can also be played on an iPhone, iPad, and iPod touch by downloading it from the AppStore. It is said to have had an affect on how the series ended and who won, humans or vampires, though there is no real evidence. Pick a side, pick a character, and use controls to fight the opposing side. Every time you win, you add points to your team's overall score, Team Human or Team Vampire. Whichever team leads in the Humans vs. Vampires game will effect who pulls ahead in the actual TV series. You can use 3D glasses to play the game in 3D, or just play in 2D. Either way, the special effects are high-quality, realistic, and even includes video and voice. Even the site itself has improved enormously, just see for yourself. You can represent Team Human by playing as Ethan, Sarah, Benny or Rory. Or you can represent Team Vampire and play as Jesse, Erica, Zombie Principal (Principal Hicks as a zombie) or Nurse Vee (Annie from Blood Drive) Before you pick a character, you can see their profile, which explaining their special moves and who they are. Each character has different attacks, but their controls are similar. For example, Erica and Sarah may both be vampires, but Erica has special vampire moves while Sarah's moves are more only the fighting instead of supernatural side. The characters all have more than one special move. For example, only Ethan can throw holy-water balloons, do a Dagger Uppercut, and a Light saber Roundhouse. But, all the characters can jump, duck, punch, throw, and kick. You can even combine them to do more powerful attacks like a jump-kick, or low-kick that will knock down opponent.

characters.name: Jakeward
characters.description: Ethan as Jakeward. During the episodeHalloweird,Ethanwas turned into Jakeward byRorywho hadTaquaks Maskon. Jakeward is a character fromDusk(a parody of Twilight so Jakeward is Jacob and Edward's names combined) , in the original movie he was called James but in Halloweird the name was changed to Jakeward. He is in love withRochelle(whoSarahdressed up as).

characters.name: Jen
characters.description: Jen is a character who appeared inSmells Like TroubleandBlue Moon. In, Smells Like Trouble, she was one of the girls who got potioned by Benny. When she gets angry, she gets a whip, and tries to tie Benny's feet together, she misses, falling to the ground. In Blue Moon, she was trying out for soccer, but when Sarah was there, she accidentally gave her a concussion. The coach then took her to the nurse. She also was in the movie and was watching Dusk.

characters.name: Jesse
characters.description: Jesse is awesome! Jesse(real name:Reverend Horace Black) is the main antagonist of the movieMy Babysitter's a Vampire. He was the leader of a destroyed Vampire Cult which he attempts to raise again. He also serves as the main antagonist for the series' first season and an anti-hero for the series' second season. He was portrayed by Joe Dinicol.

characters.name: Kurt Lockner
characters.description: Kurt LocknerInformationFull NameKurt LocknerDate of Birthc. 1994 (age 19) and (17) in fledgling yearsStatusUndeadTurnedByErica Jonesin 2011Resides inWhitechapel, Ontario CanadaOccupationStudent of High SchoolRelationship StatusSingleSpeciesHuman(originally/formerly)Vampire(currently)Family InformationRelativesUnnamed (father)Unnamed (mother)Romance(s)Erica Jones(ex-girlfriend)Friend(s)Erica JonesEnemiesEthan MorganBenny WeirSarah Fox(currently/ex-friend)AffiliationLockner FamilyWhitechapel High SchoolPhysical DescriptionGenderMaleEye ColorBrownHair ColorBrownAppearancePortrayed byWilliam GreenblattSeason1First AppearanceFriday Night FrightsLast AppearanceFriday Night FrightsKurt "The Hurt" Lockneris a wrestler who goes toWhitechapel High School. He first appeared in the episode "Friday Night Frights" and was shown to be datingEricathroughout the episode. After their first date,Sarahdecides to check on him to see if Erica turned him into aVampire. He is shown to be very strong and is on the wrestling team. He is beaten byEthanin a wrestling match so thatCoach Edwould leave him alone. It is shown that if Ethan didn't beat Kurt and win a trophy, Kurt would get married to Sarah which is what drove Ethan to fight him in the first place. By the end of the episode, while on his second date with Erica, it's assumed that he was bitten by her and turned into afledgling.
